positive: Minimalist abstract geometric woodland pattern featuring stylized silhouettes of diverse foliage (leaves, ferns, branches) mixed with simple geometric shapes (circles, triangles) in a continuous, interlocking arrangement. Color palette is limited to deep emerald green, sage green, terracotta burnt orange, and matte cream background. Style is highly scalable, clean vector art, linocut woodblock print aesthetic, negative space emphasis, high contrast, perfect for repeat apparel textile print. Centered composition, flat lay, graphic design.
